en.title: Rust Fundamentals
en.description: Start your Rust journey. Learn syntax, ownership, borrowing, structs, enums, pattern matching, and build your first Rust programs with Cargo.

pt.title: Fundamentos de Rust
pt.description: Comece sua jornada em Rust. Aprenda sintaxe, ownership, borrowing, structs, enums, pattern matching e crie seus primeiros programas com Cargo.

es.title: Fundamentos de Rust
es.description: Comienza tu viaje en Rust. Aprende sintaxis, ownership, borrowing, structs, enums, pattern matching y crea tus primeros programas con Cargo.
